metadata.title: Generate a governed SR9 orchestration prompt for a content system using the technical_lens, capable of handling schema_blur chaos input with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria, and producing a validated artifact with explicit validation gates.

mission.primary_objective: Generate a governed SR9 orchestration prompt for a content system using the technical_lens, capable of handling schema_blur chaos input with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria, and producing a validated artifact with explicit validation gates.
mission.success_definition: Artifact is a valid SR9 orchestration prompt.; All validation gates are explicitly defined and actionable.; Schema_blur input is processed without error, with ambiguities documented.; Output contract contains all required sections and is SR8-compilable.; Technical_lens analysis is applied consistently throughout.

in_scope.item: The prompt must define a content system orchestration that accepts schema_blur input, applies technical_lens analysis, enforces validation gates at each stage, and outputs a structured artifact with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. The system must handle incomplete and ambiguous inputs without failure.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Artifact is a valid SR9 orchestration prompt.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: All validation gates are explicitly defined and actionable.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Schema_blur input is processed without error, with ambiguities documented.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Output contract contains all required sections and is SR8-compilable.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: Technical_lens analysis is applied consistently throughout.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.orchestration_goal: Generate a governed SR9 orchestration prompt for a content system using the technical_lens, capable of handling schema_blur chaos input with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria, and producing a validated artifact with explicit validation gates.

routing_rules.item: Must use SR9 orchestration format with explicit validation gates.
Must accept schema_blur input type (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria).
Must apply technical_lens for analysis and transformation.
Output must be SR8-compilable with all required sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.
No hallucination or fabrication of missing data; must flag ambiguities for human resolution.
Must operate within Canadian regulatory and content compliance frameworks.

blocked_state.item: Stop, record blocker, and request repair.

SRXML_Artifact.final_report_contract: format: JSON; sections: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent; compiled_intent_structure: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: array of strings; Success Criteria: array of strings; Output Contract: object with format and sections; validation_gates: Gate 1: Input schema validation - check for required fields and flag missing context.; Gate 2: Technical_lens applicability - verify lens can process input type.; Gate 3: Ambiguity resolution - list ambiguous items for human review.; Gate 4: Constraint completeness - ensure all constraints are captured.; Gate 5: Output contract compliance - verify all sections present and SR8-compilable.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
